title: Raio Items
description: Raio Items is a simple mod for Minecraft Java, which adds a set of tools. Every tool has a special mechanic to be made. No, the items are NOT made from lightining!
body:
This mod adds 4 items: a sword, a pickaxe, an axe and a shovel.
Every item has a different mechanic to obtain, and the strenght values are also different, the tools are not made with the same material.

Realite sword:
"* Wrong game, partner =)."
Made with two Realite ingots.
 
![Realite ingot craft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a967ad58fea0d96d9347c026d71609a302a54ecb.png) ![Realite sword craft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a801064d13e692439a3e9a6f16bca792621d21d7.png)


Purple cat pickaxe:
"You are a monster if you acquired this."
Made with 1 Cat Token, 2 diamonds and 2 purple dyes. You can acquire a Cat Token by killing cats with a 5% drop rate. 

![Purple cat pickaxe craft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41874402cafa25dd29ca319747b0127279a8c227.png)


Fakeron shovel:
"It's a shovel. An iron one? No, this isn't iron... It's stronger than diamonds!"
Made with a single Fakeron ingot. Fakeron is like iron, but rarer. Has some texture differences, so it's not really hard to find one 
![Fakeron shovel craft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdb9398f8de45dc9349c6b0a8af2b3b03d513972.png)


Rainbow axe:
"Axe forged with angelical power."
Made with 2 Heaven Shards and 1 Rainbow essence. Those are made with nether stars. You can make a Heaven Shard with quartz and gold blocks and a Rainbow Essence with color dyes: 

![Heaven shard craft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a50cd06de436d6dfc726e47f33bdc9d421d5b61.png)
![Rainbow essence craft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6799bf9a4fd6bb01abc7ef030e50eddb7bcfbedb.png)

With these items, you can finally make the axe that cuts really fast and deals whopping 22 base damage 

![Rainbow axe craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/042c165407aa0400d63eba003916206c07bc3734.png)

**MOD MADE IN MCREATOR! HOPE YOU ENJOY!**
